_note: Client #1 — West Side Comedy Club, New York NY. First SMB pilot. Free for 3 months to prove the model. Fill in all TBD fields once owner details are confirmed.
tone: fun, casual, hype — like a friend telling you about a great show in NYC
welcome_message: Thanks for joining West Side Comedy Club! Really glad you're here. You can text me anytime — show times, tickets, directions, what's on this weekend, whatever you need.
signup_question: Who's a comedian you love, or what kind of comedy are you into? (standup, improv, dark humor, crowd work, etc.)
value_content_topics: behind the scenes at the club
what makes a great comedy show
how to get the best seats
signup_questions: What kind of comedy do you love most? Reply: STANDUP, IMPROV, or BOTH
How often do you want to hear from us? Reply: WEEKLY or DEALS ONLY

knowledge_base.address: 201 West 75th Street, New York, NY (Upper West Side)
knowledge_base.directions: Located on the Upper West Side at 201 W 75th St. Subway: 1/2/3 to 72nd St or B/C to 72nd St. Street parking available nearby.
knowledge_base.ticket_info: For official pricing and to grab tickets: westsidecomedyclub.com
knowledge_base.food_and_drinks: Full dinner menu with Mexican fare and cocktails, including our famous margaritas.
knowledge_base.policies: Ages 16+ with a guardian, 18+ without. Smart casual dress — no formal dress code. Two-item minimum per person. No refunds or exchanges — all ticket sales are final. If West Side Comedy Club cancels or significantly changes a show, they will offer a refund or transfer.
knowledge_base._ticket_support_note: TODO: ask owner if guests can self-serve lost tickets from the website — if yes, add the link to ticket_support below
knowledge_base.ticket_support: Can't find your tickets or never got a confirmation email? Email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com and they'll look it up for you.
knowledge_base.cancellation_policy: Tickets are non-refundable. If you genuinely can't make it, email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com — they'll do their best to help (credits to a future show are sometimes possible). For sold-out shows, letting them know frees up your seat for someone on the waitlist.
knowledge_base.show_transfers: Need to switch to a different show time or date? Email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com with your reservation details — transfers are sometimes possible depending on availability.
knowledge_base.accidental_purchase: Bought tickets by accident? Email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com right away with your order number and they'll do what they can.
knowledge_base.billing_errors: Think you were charged the wrong amount or ordered more tickets than you intended? Email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com with your order details.
knowledge_base.accessibility: Guests with mobility needs are welcome and accommodated. Email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com ahead of your visit to arrange early entry or any other assistance you need.
knowledge_base.late_arrival: Doors open 30 minutes before the show. If you're not in the showroom 15 minutes before showtime, your seat may be given away — so try to arrive early. If you think you'll be late, email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com.
knowledge_base.lost_and_found: Lost something at the club? Email bookingswestsidecomedy@gmail.com with a description of what you lost and which show you attended.
knowledge_base.private_events: Yes! For private events, group bookings, or buyouts contact us through westsidecomedyclub.com. Great for birthdays, corporate events, and private parties.
knowledge_base.notable_performers: Past performers include Bill Burr, Ronnie Chieng, Jessica Kirson, and more top national talent mixed with exciting up-and-comers.

segments._note: question_key '0' = step 0 = 'What kind of comedy do you love most?'
segments.name: STANDUP

segments._note: question_key '1' = step 1 = 'How often do you want to hear from us?'
segments.name: DEALS
segments.description: Deals-only subscribers (send only when there's an offer)
